query: SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.userId, p.displayName, p.avatarInitials, p.livesRemaining, p.totalPoints, p.currentStreak, p.daysComplete, p.updatedAt FROM participants p WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%'; SELECT pe.id AS paymentEventId, pe.participantId, pe.dailyLogId, pe.reason, pe.status, pe.amountPence, pe.createdAt FROM payment_events pe JOIN participants p ON p.id = pe.participantId WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY pe.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT dl.id AS dailyLogId, dl.participantId, dl.dayNumber, dl.logDate, dl.dayComplete, dl.exerciseProofUrl, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt, dl.updatedAt FROM daily_logs dl JOIN participants p ON p.id = dl.participantId WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2P9ir9M7b3E7Qkh.8b2c854ea8b3 --database HPubf4auNvt8KXvgrLad5c --execute SELECT p.id AS participantId, p.userId, p.displayName, p.avatarInitials, p.livesRemaining, p.totalPoints, p.currentStreak, p.daysComplete, p.updatedAt FROM participants p WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%'; SELECT pe.id AS paymentEventId, pe.participantId, pe.dailyLogId, pe.reason, pe.status, pe.amountPence, pe.createdAt FROM payment_events pe JOIN participants p ON p.id = pe.participantId WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY pe.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT dl.id AS dailyLogId, dl.participantId, dl.dayNumber, dl.logDate, dl.dayComplete, dl.exerciseProofUrl, dl.pointsAwarded, dl.submittedAt, dl.updatedAt FROM daily_logs dl JOIN participants p ON p.id = dl.participantId WHERE LOWER(p.displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(p.whatsappName) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY dl.dayNumber DESC LIMIT 10;
